---
title: "Jane Doe"
subtitle: "PhD Student"
image: /images/portraits/placeholder.svg
role: phd
weight: 3
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:jane@cornell.edu"
---

*(Example member — replace with a real lab member.)* Jane studies plant
functional traits and their role in tropical forest responses to drought.
